nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
gold_sql: SELECT so.stage, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.status_code = 4 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as ontime_rate FROM sf_opportunities so JOIN sf_accounts sa ON so.account_id = sa.account_id JOIN customers c ON c.email = sa.email_address JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref GROUP BY so.stage
